programme.desc: Count Alucard (Lon Chaney) makes Southern belle (Louise Allbritton) his bride.

programme.title: Son of Frankenstein
programme.desc: The baron's son (Basil Rathbone) revives his father's monster (Boris Karloff) with help from a broken-necked shepherd called Ygor (Bela Lugosi).","large":"Baron Wolf von Frankenstein is determined to prove the legitimacy of his father's scientific work, thus rescuing the family name from disgrace. With the help of Ygor, a grave robber, Wolf successfully reanimates the monster his father originally brought back from the dead. But when several villagers are killed mysteriously, Wolf must find the culprit in order to vindicate his creation, or face the possibility that he may be responsible.

programme.title: Sssssss
programme.desc: A snake scientist (Strother Martin) turns his daughter's (Heather Menzies) boyfriend (Dirk Benedict), his lab helper, into a big cobra.","large":"Short on cash, undergrad David Blake (Dirk Benedict) takes a job working as a lab assistant for snake expert Dr. Carl Stoner (Strother Martin). When Stoner begins giving David a series of antibiotics as a safeguard against snakebites, he at first thinks nothing of it. But gradually David begins to notice curious changes in his body, and his new girlfriend, Dr. Stoner's daughter, Kristina (Heather Menzies), notices them too. Could Dr. Stoner really be trying to turn his assistant into a snake?

programme.title: Tarantula
programme.desc: Desert scientists (John Agar, Mara Corday, Leo G. Carroll) try to stop a fortified spider the size of a building.

programme.title: The Thing
programme.desc: An alien that can duplicate other life forms invades a polar research station in this remake of the 1951 classic "The Thing from Another World."","large":"In remote Antarctica, a group of American research scientists are disturbed at their base camp by a helicopter shooting at a sled dog. When they take in the dog, it brutally attacks both human beings and canines in the camp, and they discover that the beast can assume the shape of its victims. A resourceful helicopter pilot and the camp doctor lead the camp crew in a desperate, gory battle against the vicious creature before it picks them all off, one by one.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Four big worms with multiple tongues dig high-speed around people (Kevin Bacon, Fred Ward, Finn Carter) in the middle of nowhere.","large":"Repairmen Val McKee (Kevin Bacon) and Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) are tired of their dull lives in the small desert town of Perfection, Nev. But just as the two try to skip town, they happen upon a series of mysterious deaths and a concerned seismologist (Finn Carter) studying unnatural readings below the ground. With the help of an eccentric couple (Reba McEntire, Michael Gross), the group fights for survival against giant, worm-like monsters hungry for human flesh.

programme.title: Tremors II: Aftershocks
programme.desc: The Mexican government hires two handymen (Fred Ward, Michael Gross) to battle huge man-eating worms plaguing an oil field.","large":"After spending all the reward money from his first encounter with the giant man-eating worms called Graboids, Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) agrees to hunt more of the deadly creatures at a Mexican oil refinery for $50,000 each. Knowing that he cannot face the monsters alone, Earl recruits Burt Gummer (Michael Gross), another veteran of the incident in Nevada, to supply the firepower. There is only one problem: The Graboids have now evolved to attack above ground.

programme.title: The Werewolf of London
programme.desc: An Asian werewolf (Warner Oland) bites a botanist (Henry Hull) in Tibet and rivals him for the antidote in London.","large":"While in Tibet researching a mysterious flower that purportedly takes its strength from the moon, botanist Wilfred Glendon is bitten by a strange creature. Back in London, Glendon becomes absorbed in his research of the plant, and is annoyed by the appearance of fellow scientist Dr. Yogami, who reveals that the plant is the only known temporary antidote for werewolves. Glendon remains skeptical until the next full moon, when he undergoes a startling transformation.

programme.title: The Wolf Man
programme.desc: Bitten by a werewolf, an aristocrat (Lon Chaney) grows fangs, fur and a muzzle, then begs his father (Claude Rains) for help.","large":"When his brother dies, Larry Talbot (Lon Chaney) returns to Wales and reconciles with his father (Claude Rains). While there, he visits an antique shop and, hoping to impress Gwen (Evelyn Ankers), the attractive shopkeeper, buys a silver walking cane. That same night he kills a wolf with it, only to later learn that he actually killed a man (Bela Lugosi). A gypsy (Maria Ouspenskaya) explains that it was her son, a werewolf, that he killed, and that Larry is now one himself.

programme.title: Altered
programme.desc: Fifteen years after they were abducted by aliens, four men get a chance to take revenge when they capture one of the creatures.","large":"Forever damaged by their stint as the scientific subjects of hostile alien creatures, a trio of alien-abduction survivors -- Otis (Michael C. Williams), Duke (Brad William Henke) and Cody (Paul McCarthy-Boyington) -- troll the wooded site of their disappearance, heavily armed, in search of their attackers. After wounding a violent alien in the woods, the three drag its dying body to the home of reclusive fellow abductee Wyatt (Adam Kaufman), barricade themselves in and prepare for the worst.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: When plans for a weekend vacation hit a dead end, friends find themselves stranded in unfamiliar territory, pursued by a bloodthirsty predator. Holed up in an isolated cabin, the friends must fight to survive as the body count rises.

programme.title: The Atticus Institute
programme.desc: In the early 1970s, Dr. Henry West creates an institute to find people with supernatural abilities. When Judith Winstead comes to the facility, she exhibits amazing abilities that the military wants to turn into a weapon.

programme.title: Beneath
programme.desc: Coal miners become trapped 600 feet below the surface. As the air grows toxic and time runs out, the crew descends into madness and turns on one another.

programme.title: The Birds II: Land's End
programme.desc: Killer birds infest a seaside town where parents (Brad Johnson, Chelsea Field) take their children for vacation.

programme.title: The Black Castle
programme.desc: An Englishman (Richard Greene) enters an Austrian nobleman's (Stephen McNally) castle, complete with torture chamber and alligator moat.

programme.title: Blood Creek
programme.desc: Two brothers become entangled in a sinister Nazi's occult experiment at an American farmhouse.

programme.title: Captive Wild Woman
programme.desc: A mad doctor (John Carradine) turns an animal trainer's (Milburn Stone) ape into Paula the ape-woman (Acquanetta).

programme.title: Cherry Falls
programme.desc: A serial killer stalking virgins in a small Virginia town targets an idealistic teenager (Brittany Murphy).","large":"A small-town sheriff, Brent Marken (Michael Biehn), discovers the presence of a serial killer in his sleepy hamlet. Since the perpetrator has been targeting only virgins, both male and female, the deaths cause panic in much of the local high school population. Sheriff Marken's daughter, Jody (Brittany Murphy), is among the potential victims, since she has yet to sleep with her boyfriend, Kenny Ascott (Gabriel Mann). Can the lawman stop the killer before he goes after Jody?

programme.title: Cry Wolf
programme.desc: Mysterious murders occur when students (Lindy Booth, Julian Morris) at a prep school invent a story about a serial killer.

programme.title: Cucuy: The Boogeyman
programme.desc: A teenage girl under house arrest discovers that the nightmarish urban legend of the Mexican boogeyman, El Cucuy, is true.

programme.title: The Darkness
programme.desc: A supernatural force terrorizes a couple (Kevin Bacon, Radha Mitchell) and their two children after the young son brings home some mysterious rocks from the Grand Canyon.","large":"Peter Taylor (Kevin Bacon), his wife Bronny and their two children return to Los Angeles after a fun-filled vacation to the Grand Canyon. Strange events soon start to plague the family, including young son Michael's increasingly erratic behavior. The Taylors learn that Michael brought back some mysterious rocks that he discovered inside a cave. Unfortunately, something followed them home as the clan now find themselves in a battle with a supernatural force that preys on their worst fears.

programme.title: Dead in the Water
programme.desc: An all-female crew, on a boat in the middle of nowhere, must deal with an invader on their ship.

programme.title: Dead Man's Eyes
programme.desc: Blinded by acid thanks to his jealous model, an artist (Lon Chaney) needs eye tissue for an operation.

programme.title: Delirium
programme.desc: A man inherits a haunted house after spending time in a mental institution.

programme.title: Dementia 13
programme.desc: A mysterious masked killer terrorizes members of a family at a secluded estate.

programme.title: The Forest
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of her twin sister, a young American encounters the tormented spirits of Japan's mysterious and legendary Aokigahara Forest.","large":"When her twin sister disappears in Japan, a young American named Sara becomes determined to find out what happened to her. Sara's investigation leads her to the legendary Aokigahara Forest, located at the base of Mount Fuji. Accompanied by expatriate Aiden, she enters the mysterious wilderness after being warned to "stay on the path." Her investigation plunges her into a dark world where the angry and tormented souls of the dead prey on those who dare to explore the forest.

programme.title: Games
programme.desc: A mysterious woman (Simone Signoret) in black moves in with married Manhattan thrill-seekers (James Caan, Katharine Ross) and helps one trick the other.","large":"Wealthy and bored, Paul (James Caan) and Jennifer Montgomery (Katharine Ross) while away their hours in a New York City apartment filled with pinball machines and other amusements. The couple's routine is upended when door-to-door saleswoman Lisa Schindler (Simone Signoret) drops by and is suddenly taken ill. The Montgomerys let her spend the night. And soon, the sophisticated Lisa and her hosts embark on a new set of very adult -- and very dangerous -- games.

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: A televangelist (Gregory Itzin) influences a confrontational man (Billy Burke) motivated by revenge.

programme.title: The Green Inferno
programme.desc: Student activists (Lorenza Izzo, Ariel Levy) crash-land in the Amazon and encounter an indigenous tribe of cannibals who'd like to have them for dinner.","large":"New York college student Justine (Lorenza Izzo), a lawyer's daughter, meets a student activist named Alejandro (Ariel Levy) when he goes on a hunger strike on behalf of underpaid janitors. Smitten, Justine agrees to help Alejandro undertake his next project: to save the Amazon. She soon learns to regret her decision when their plane crashes in the Peruvian jungle and she and the rest of their group are taken captive by a tribe of hungry cannibals.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Yuppies (Dwier Brown, Carey Lowell) with a baby hire a nanny (Jenny Seagrove), a druid witch who sacrifices babies to a tree.","large":"Optimistic about their future, well-off parents Kate (Carey Lowell) and Phil (Dwier Brown) hire the pleasant and lovely young Camilla (Jenny Seagrove) to live with them and care for their new baby. Though Camilla seems like an answer to their prayers, she proves to be more than she appears, and a diabolical plot involving the wellbeing of their child is uncovered. The young parents are forced to fight supernatural forces for the life of their vulnerable offspring.

programme.title: The Hitcher II: I've Been Waiting
programme.desc: A psychopathic hitchhiker (Jake Busey) terrorizes a man (C. Thomas Howell) and his girlfriend (Kari Wuhrer) as they take a road trip.","large":"Years after being traumatized by a hitchhiker, Jim Halsey (C. Thomas Howell) is trying to piece his life back together. After being suspended from the police force, he decides to return to Texas to speak with a friend about his problems. He reluctantly agrees to let his girlfriend, Maggie (Kari Wuhrer), join him. As they drive, Maggie lets a stranded driver (Jake Busey) into the car. Halsey becomes suspicious and kicks him out, but the stranger returns, undeterred, to wreak havoc.

programme.title: I Saw What You Did
programme.desc: Two teenage girls, bored while baby-sitting, make prank phone calls, completely unaware one of the people on the other end of the line has just killed his wife and now thinks the girls must be silenced.","large":"Kit (Sarah Lane) and her best friend, Libby (Andi Garrett), are two teenage girls bored while baby-sitting. To pass the time, they make prank phone calls, telling the person on the other end of the line, "I saw what you did, and I know who you are!" It's all in good fun, until they call a man (John Ireland) who just murdered his wife and buried her in the woods. Convinced they actually do know his secret, he becomes determined to find out who they are and silence them forever.

programme.title: Incarnate
programme.desc: Recruited by a Vatican emissary (Catalina Sandino Moreno), an exorcist (Aaron Eckhart) taps into the subconscious mind of a tormented boy (David Mazouz) to free him from demonic possession.","large":"After a single mother witnesses terrifying symptoms of demonic possession in her 11-year-old son (David Mazouz), a Vatican representative calls on wheelchair-bound scientist Dr. Seth Ember (Aaron Eckhart) to rid him of the evil spirit. Driven by a personal agenda rooted in his own tragic past, Ember enters the boy's unconscious mind where he confronts a demon as ferocious as it is ingenious.

programme.title: Karma
programme.desc: When recent college grad Manny has trouble making ends meet, his father-in-law offers him a job evicting delinquent tenants. Manny soon finds himself unleashing a karma demon which stalks him at every turn.

programme.title: The Keeping Hours
programme.desc: A lawyer sees the ghost of his dead son, which leads the man's estranged wife back into his life.

programme.title: Killer High
programme.desc: Sabrina's perfectly planned high school reunion goes south when a monster keeps killing all the guests.

programme.title: Boogeyman
programme.desc: Mike (Eddie McClintock), the town sheriff, has to battle the mythical Boogeyman after boys accidentally release it.

programme.title: Long Time Dead
programme.desc: A genie terrorizes London students (Lara Belmont, Melanie Gutteridge) after they unwittingly summon it with a Ouija.","large":"After a long night of dancing and drinking their way into a haze, roommates Rob (Joe Absolom), Liam (Alec Newman), Stella (Lara Belmont) and Spencer (James Hillier) and a few of their friends duck into a back room of the nightclub to play around with a Ouija board. None of the friends like what the board tells them: they will all die that night. Sure enough, one by one the young friends are slaughtered by a malevolent killer, amid revelations about satanic worship and sacrifice.

programme.title: The New Daughter
programme.desc: A single father (Kevin Costner) is puzzled by his daughter's (Ivana Baquero) weird behavior, which begins soon after he moves his family to a secluded woodland home.

programme.title: Nightmare
programme.desc: A guardian (David Knight) and his lover (Moira Redmond) stage grim scenes to drive a haunted English heiress (Jennie Linden) mad.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: Overstressed New Yorkers (Paul Rudd, Jennifer Aniston) think they've found the answer to their problems when they join a counterculture community where the only rule is to be oneself.","large":"George (Paul Rudd) and Linda (Jennifer Aniston) have overextended, overstressed lives in Manhattan. After George loses his job, he and Linda have little choice but to move to Atlanta and stay with his terrible brother. On the way, the couple happen upon Elysium, an idyllic counterculture community, where money, careers and clothing are strictly optional. George and Linda think that they can make a fresh start in Elysium, only they may be trading one set of problems for another.

programme.title: Wet Hot American Summer
programme.desc: After their charges have left, staff members of a children's camp pursue romances that have been brewing all season.","large":"Set on the last day of camp, in the hot summer of 1981, "Wet Hot American Summer" follows a group of counselors who are each trying to complete their unfinished business before the day ends. The entire summer of pent-up sexual frustrations, unresolved post-traumatic stress, pending separations and of course, the talent show, all weigh heavily on the minds and groins of counselors and campers alike.

programme.title: The Wedding Date
programme.desc: A desperate woman (Debra Messing) pays a male escort (Dermot Mulroney) $6,000 to accompany her to London for her sister's wedding.","large":"With the wedding of her younger sister (Amy Adams) fast approaching, Kat Ellis (Debra Messing) faces the undesirable prospect of traveling alone to London for the ceremony. While this is bad enough, Jeffrey (Jeremy Sheffield), the man who left her as they moved closer to marriage, happens to be the groom's best man. Determined to show everyone -- most of all Jeffrey -- that her romantic life is as full and thrilling as ever, Kat hires a charming male escort (Dermot Mulroney) as her date.

programme.title: You, Me and Dupree
programme.desc: Three become a crowd when a newlywed (Matt Dillon) invites his jobless buddy (Owen Wilson) to temporarily move in with him and his wife (Kate Hudson).","large":"Newlyweds Carl (Matt Dillon) and Molly (Kate Hudson) are anxious to start their lives together, but the pair soon become a trio when Carl invites his jobless buddy Randy (Owen Wilson) to crash at their place until he gets back on his feet. At first, Carl is happy to have him around, but that soon turns to annoyance when Randy threatens to become a permanent fixture in their home.

programme.title: The Five-Year Engagement
programme.desc: Career plans and other obstacles stand in the way of two lovers (Jason Segel, Emily Blunt) who run into trouble each time they try to set a wedding date.","large":"On their one-year anniversary, sous chef Tom Solomon (Jason Segel) plans to surprise his girlfriend, Violet Barnes (Emily Blunt), with an engagement ring. The lovers do end up engaged, but the fact that the proposal does not go exactly as planned proves to be a harbinger of things to come. Each time they try to set a date, various obstacles stand in their way. As more and more time passes, Tom and Violet begin to wonder if perhaps their marriage is not meant to be.

programme.title: American Pie Presents: Band Camp
programme.desc: A lewd teen (Tad Hilgenbrinck) causes mischief when he must attend a camp for musicians.

programme.title: Kicking & Screaming
programme.desc: A vitamin salesman (Will Ferrell) and his overly competitive father (Robert Duvall) go head-to-head as coaches of children's rival soccer teams.","large":"As a child, Phil Weston (Will Ferrell) was never able to live up to the demands of his overbearing father, Buck (Robert Duvall), who wanted Phil to be an athlete. Now a parent himself, Phil has inherited his father's competitive nature, while his son, Sam (Dylan McLaughlin), has inherited Phil's lack of athletic talent. Serving as Sam's soccer coach, Phil hopes to turn his last-place team of losers into champions, so they can beat the rival team coached by Buck.

programme.title: Blockers
programme.desc: Lisa, Hunter and Mitchell learn that their teenage daughters plan to lose their virginity on prom night. The worried parents soon join forces for a wild and chaotic quest to stop the girls from sealing the deal -- no matter what the cost.","large":"Julie, Kayla and Sam are three high school seniors who make a pact to lose their virginity on prom night. Lisa, Mitchell and Hunter are three overprotective parents who flip out when they find out about their daughters' plans. They soon join forces for a wild and chaotic quest to stop the girls from sealing the deal -- no matter what the cost.

programme.title: Good Boys
programme.desc: From the guys who brought you Superbad, Neighbors and Sausage Party. You must be this tall to see this movie.","large":"Invited to his first kissing party, 12-year-old Max asks his best friends Lucas and Thor for some much-needed help on how to pucker up. When they hit a dead end, Max decides to use his father's drone to spy on the teenage girls next door. When the boys lose the drone, they skip school and hatch a plan to retrieve it before Max's dad can figure out what happened.

programme.title: Bad Words
programme.desc: A misanthropic adult (Jason Bateman) enters a national spelling bee by way of a rules loophole and inexplicably bonds with a precocious boy whose strict father is pressuring him to win.","large":"Guy Trilby (Jason Bateman), a 40-year-old misanthrope, makes waves at a regional spelling bee when, due to a loophole in the rules, he is allowed to enter -- and later wins. Hurling insults at every turn, Guy advances to the national contest in Los Angeles, accompanied by a reporter (Kathryn Hahn) who wants to discover his hidden motives for entering the bee. As the competition gears up, friendless Guy inexplicably forms a bond with a young speller who is feeling parental pressure to win.

programme.title: Admission
programme.desc: A driven Princeton University admissions officer (Tina Fey) thinks that a precocious applicant from an experimental high school may be the son she gave up for adoption.","large":"When straight-laced Princeton University admissions officer Portia Nathan (Tina Fey) pays a recruiting visit to an alternative high school, she receives some news that catches her way off-guard. John Pressman (Paul Rudd), head of the school and Portia's former college classmate, has surmised that his student, Jeremiah, is the son that Portia secretly gave up for adoption. Portia puts her career at risk by bending the rules for Jeremiah but also discovers a life and romance she never imagined.

programme.title: American Pie Presents: Band Camp
programme.desc: A lewd teen (Tad Hilgenbrinck) causes mischief when he must attend a camp for musicians.

programme.title: Kicking & Screaming
programme.desc: A vitamin salesman (Will Ferrell) and his overly competitive father (Robert Duvall) go head-to-head as coaches of children's rival soccer teams.","large":"As a child, Phil Weston (Will Ferrell) was never able to live up to the demands of his overbearing father, Buck (Robert Duvall), who wanted Phil to be an athlete. Now a parent himself, Phil has inherited his father's competitive nature, while his son, Sam (Dylan McLaughlin), has inherited Phil's lack of athletic talent. Serving as Sam's soccer coach, Phil hopes to turn his last-place team of losers into champions, so they can beat the rival team coached by Buck.

They soon join forces for a wild and chaotic quest to stop the girls from sealing the deal -- no matter what the cost.

When the boys lose the drone, they skip school and hatch a plan to retrieve it before Max's dad can figure out what happened.

Hurling insults at every turn, Guy advances to the national contest in Los Angeles, accompanied by a reporter (Kathryn Hahn) who wants to discover his hidden motives for entering the bee. programme.desc: A driven Princeton University admissions officer (Tina Fey) thinks that a precocious applicant from an experimental high school may be the son she gave up for adoption.","large":"When straight-laced Princeton University admissions officer Portia Nathan (Tina Fey) pays a recruiting visit to an alternative high school, she receives some news that catches her way off-guard. John Pressman (Paul Rudd), head of the school and Portia's former college classmate, has surmised that his student, Jeremiah, is the son that Portia secretly gave up for adoption. Portia puts her career at risk by bending the rules for Jeremiah but also discovers a life and romance she never imagined.

programme.title: American Pie Presents: Band Camp
programme.desc: A lewd teen (Tad Hilgenbrinck) causes mischief when he must attend a camp for musicians.

programme.title: Kicking & Screaming
programme.desc: A vitamin salesman (Will Ferrell) and his overly competitive father (Robert Duvall) go head-to-head as coaches of children's rival soccer teams.","large":"As a child, Phil Weston (Will Ferrell) was never able to live up to the demands of his overbearing father, Buck (Robert Duvall), who wanted Phil to be an athlete. Now a parent himself, Phil has inherited his father's competitive nature, while his son, Sam (Dylan McLaughlin), has inherited Phil's lack of athletic talent. Serving as Sam's soccer coach, Phil hopes to turn his last-place team of losers into champions, so they can beat the rival team coached by Buck.

programme.title: Halloween II
programme.desc: A killer follows his injured target (Jamie Lee Curtis) to the hospital on Oct. 31 in Haddonfield, Ill.","large":"After failing to kill stubborn survivor Laurie (Jamie Lee Curtis) and taking a bullet or six from former psychiatrist Dr. Sam Loomis (Donald Pleasence), Michael Myers (Jonathan Prince) has followed Laurie to the Haddonfield Memorial Hospital, where she's been admitted for Myers' attempt on her life. The institution proves to be particularly suited to serial killers, however, as Myers cuts, stabs and slashes his way through hospital staff to reach his favorite victim.

programme.title: Halloween III: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: Two people (Tom Atkins, Stacey Nelkin) discover that a TV commercial will cue a madman's (Dan O'Herlihy) Halloween masks to explode.","large":"Hospital emergency room Dr. Daniel "Dan" Challis (Tom Atkins) and Ellie Grimbridge (Stacey Nelkin), the daughter of a murder victim, uncover a terrible plot by small-town mask maker Conal Cochran (Dan O'Herlihy), a madman who's planning a Halloween mass murder utilizing an ancient Celtic ritual. The ritual involves a boulder stolen from Stonehenge, the use of Silver Shamrock masks and a triggering device contained in a television commercial -- all designed to kill millions of children.

programme.title: Child's Play 2
programme.desc: While Andy's mother is admitted to a psychiatric hospital, the young boy is placed in foster care, and Chucky, determined to claim Andy's soul, is not far behind.","large":"Two years after serial killer Charles Lee Ray (Brad Dourif) inserted his soul into a Chucky doll, a toy company attempts to re-create the doll, bringing Ray back in the process. The possessed doll, intent on claiming a human body, kills his way toward former owner Andy (Alex Vincent), who now lives in a foster home. Andy's foster sister, Kyle (Christine Elise), tries to protect him, but his foster parents believe Andy is just a troubled kid -- and Chucky's murderous path continues.

programme.title: Child's Play 3
programme.desc: Chucky returns for revenge against Andy, the young boy who defeated him, and now a teenager living in a military academy.","large":"It's been years since Chucky, the doll with the soul and the voice (Brad Dourif) of a psychopathic killer, was apparently destroyed in a fire at a doll factory. Now Chucky's manufacturer is remaking the same line of toys with the old, still haunted materials. This resurrects Chucky, who goes after Andy (Justin Whalin), his former owner, who now attends military school. Chucky slashes his way through a string of grotesque murders as Andy tries to stop the homicidal doll and the spirit within it.

programme.title: Curse of Chucky
programme.desc: Out for revenge, Chucky (Brad Dourif) the killer doll infiltrates the family of a woman, her sister and her young niece.

programme.title: Cult of Chucky
programme.desc: Chucky returns to terrorize his human victim, Nica, who is confined to an asylum for the criminally insane. Meanwhile, the killer doll has some scores to settle with his old enemies, with the help of his former wife.

programme.title: Halloween II
programme.desc: A killer follows his injured target (Jamie Lee Curtis) to the hospital on Oct. 31 in Haddonfield, Ill.","large":"After failing to kill stubborn survivor Laurie (Jamie Lee Curtis) and taking a bullet or six from former psychiatrist Dr. Sam Loomis (Donald Pleasence), Michael Myers (Jonathan Prince) has followed Laurie to the Haddonfield Memorial Hospital, where she's been admitted for Myers' attempt on her life. The institution proves to be particularly suited to serial killers, however, as Myers cuts, stabs and slashes his way through hospital staff to reach his favorite victim.

programme.desc: Two people (Tom Atkins, Stacey Nelkin) discover that a TV commercial will cue a madman's (Dan O'Herlihy) Halloween masks to explode.","large":"Hospital emergency room Dr. Daniel "Dan" Challis (Tom Atkins) and Ellie Grimbridge (Stacey Nelkin), the daughter of a murder victim, uncover a terrible plot by small-town mask maker Conal Cochran (Dan O'Herlihy), a madman who's planning a Halloween mass murder utilizing an ancient Celtic ritual. The ritual involves a boulder stolen from Stonehenge, the use of Silver Shamrock masks and a triggering device contained in a television commercial -- all designed to kill millions of children.

The possessed doll, intent on claiming a human body, kills his way toward former owner Andy (Alex Vincent), who now lives in a foster home. Andy's foster sister, Kyle (Christine Elise), tries to protect him, but his foster parents believe Andy is just a troubled kid -- and Chucky's murderous path continues.

programme.desc: Chucky returns for revenge against Andy, the young boy who defeated him, and now a teenager living in a military academy.","large":"It's been years since Chucky, the doll with the soul and the voice (Brad Dourif) of a psychopathic killer, was apparently destroyed in a fire at a doll factory. This resurrects Chucky, who goes after Andy (Justin Whalin), his former owner, who now attends military school. Chucky slashes his way through a string of grotesque murders as Andy tries to stop the homicidal doll and the spirit within it.

programme.title: Curse of Chucky
programme.desc: Out for revenge, Chucky (Brad Dourif) the killer doll infiltrates the family of a woman, her sister and her young niece.

programme.title: Cult of Chucky
programme.desc: Chucky returns to terrorize his human victim, Nica, who is confined to an asylum for the criminally insane. Meanwhile, the killer doll has some scores to settle with his old enemies, with the help of his former wife.

programme.title: Halloween II
programme.desc: A killer follows his injured target (Jamie Lee Curtis) to the hospital on Oct. 31 in Haddonfield, Ill.","large":"After failing to kill stubborn survivor Laurie (Jamie Lee Curtis) and taking a bullet or six from former psychiatrist Dr. Sam Loomis (Donald Pleasence), Michael Myers (Jonathan Prince) has followed Laurie to the Haddonfield Memorial Hospital, where she's been admitted for Myers' attempt on her life. The institution proves to be particularly suited to serial killers, however, as Myers cuts, stabs and slashes his way through hospital staff to reach his favorite victim.

programme.title: Halloween III: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: Two people (Tom Atkins, Stacey Nelkin) discover that a TV commercial will cue a madman's (Dan O'Herlihy) Halloween masks to explode.","large":"Hospital emergency room Dr. Daniel "Dan" Challis (Tom Atkins) and Ellie Grimbridge (Stacey Nelkin), the daughter of a murder victim, uncover a terrible plot by small-town mask maker Conal Cochran (Dan O'Herlihy), a madman who's planning a Halloween mass murder utilizing an ancient Celtic ritual. The ritual involves a boulder stolen from Stonehenge, the use of Silver Shamrock masks and a triggering device contained in a television commercial -- all designed to kill millions of children.

programme.title: Blues Brothers 2000
programme.desc: Newly released from prison, Elwood Blues (Dan Aykroyd) reassembles the Blues Brothers Band with new members (John Goodman, Joe Morton).","large":"The now-brotherless Ellwood Blues (Dan Aykroyd) is finally out of prison, attempting to reunite the old band and find a few new partners in crime (John Goodman), (J. Evan Bonifant). In this sequel to the original "Blues Brothers" comedy/musical, Ellwood battles the Chicago police, sings and dances his way out of numerous sticky situations, and manages to get the old band on the road for a hair-raising adventure.

programme.title: A Million Ways to Die in the West
programme.desc: A pistol-packing woman (Charlize Theron) helps a cowardly farmer (Seth MacFarlane) find his inner courage, but when her outlaw husband (Liam Neeson) rides into town seeking revenge, the farmer must put his newfound bravery to the test.","large":"Mild-mannered sheep farmer Albert Stark (Seth MacFarlane) feels certain that the Western frontier is trying to kill him, then he loses his girlfriend, Louise (Amanda Seyfried), to the town's most successful businessman. However, a beautiful, pistol-packing woman named Anna (Charlize Theron) rides into town and helps Albert find his inner courage. Then Stark must put his newfound bravery to the test when Anna's outlaw husband arrives with plans to plant him in an unmarked grave.

programme.title: Hot Fuzz
programme.desc: A British constable (Simon Pegg) feels certain foul play is afoot when a series of grisly accidents rocks his quiet village.","large":"As a former London constable, Nicholas Angel (Simon Pegg) finds it difficult to adapt to his new assignment in the sleepy British village of Sandford. Not only does he miss the excitement of the big city, but he also has a well-meaning oaf (Nick Frost) for a partner. However, when a series of grisly accidents rocks Sandford, Nick smells something rotten in the idyllic village.

programme.title: The Boss
programme.desc: After her release from prison, a former CEO (Melissa McCarthy) battles old enemies while trying to build a brownie empire with her ex-assistant (Kristen Bell).","large":"Wealthy CEO Michelle Darnell (Melissa McCarthy) always gets her way, until she's busted for insider trading and sent to federal prison. After leaving jail, Darnell finds herself broke, homeless and hated. Luckily, she tracks down former assistant Claire (Kristen Bell), the only person who's willing to help. While staying with Claire and her young daughter, the ex-con devises a new business model for a brownie empire. Unfortunately, some old enemies stand in the way of her return to the top.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: A recently divorced woman (Amy Poehler) and her hotheaded sister (Tina Fey) throw a party that spirals out of control at their childhood home.","large":"When their parents decide to sell their home, siblings Maura (Amy Poehler) and Kate (Tina Fey) learn that they have one weekend to clean out the junk from their old bedroom. Unhappy with the news, the recently divorced Maura and her hotheaded sister make plans to throw one final bash to recapture their glory days with their former classmates. As the raging party begins to spiral out of control, the gals soon realize that there may not be a house left once the dust settles.

programme.title: This Is 40
programme.desc: Amid a series of personal and professional crises, a long-married couple (Paul Rudd, Leslie Mann) must figure out how to forgive, forget and enjoy the rest of their lives -- before they kill each other.","large":"After many years of marriage, Pete (Paul Rudd) is the sole male in a household that includes his wife, Debbie (Leslie Mann), and two young daughters (Iris Apatow, Maude Apatow). As Pete struggles to keep his record label afloat, he and Debbie navigate a three-week course of sex and romance, career victories and financial hardships, aging parents and maturing children. They'll have to learn to forgive, forget and enjoy the rest of their lives -- before they kill each other.

programme.title: Blues Brothers 2000
programme.desc: Newly released from prison, Elwood Blues (Dan Aykroyd) reassembles the Blues Brothers Band with new members (John Goodman, Joe Morton).","large":"The now-brotherless Ellwood Blues (Dan Aykroyd) is finally out of prison, attempting to reunite the old band and find a few new partners in crime (John Goodman), (J. Evan Bonifant). In this sequel to the original "Blues Brothers" comedy/musical, Ellwood battles the Chicago police, sings and dances his way out of numerous sticky situations, and manages to get the old band on the road for a hair-raising adventure.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: Aiming to make his fortune at gambling and gold mining, Trampas quits his job at the ranch and joins forces with a happy-go-lucky thrill-seeker (William Shatner); guest Strother Martin.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: A railroad detective (Simon Oakland) hounds a former train-robbery suspect (James Best), refusing to believe in the man's innocence even though he was cleared in court; guests Ron Soble, David McLean.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: A young cowhand (Albert Salmi) who only wants to learn to read and write could pay for the knowledge with his life when his pretty teacher's (Susan Oliver) jealous old boyfriend (Bruce Dern) comes to town.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: Enforcing the law may force Ryker to shoot at his friends who have formed a lynch mob; guests Leslie Nielsen, Harold J. Stone, Claude Akins.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: Striving to overcome failures, a rancher (Charles Bronson) obsessively drives to build a cattle empire; guests Lois Nettleton, George Kennedy.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: A Greek widower (Michael Constantine) sends to his homeland for a woman to marry, and a 19-year-old (Louise Sorel) arrives.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: A rancher (Robert Lansing) frees his condemned brother (Andrew Prine) from an Army stockade and flees to the hills, unaware he inadvertently killed a guard during the escape; guest Jan Shepard.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: A rancher facing foreclosure trades shelter and medical help for an injured thief's loot.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: The head (Ed Begley) of a family of drifters urges his cardsharp son (Tony Bill) and saloon-girl daughter to pose as respectable citizens while at Shiloh Ranch; guest Lonny Chapman.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: A man (Glenn Corbett) in love with Betsy helps local miners fight for more safety on the job; guest Virginia Christine.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: The women of Medicine Bow reject a former saloon girl (Sheree North) trying to start a new life and business after serving time for murder, especially after a local citizen is found dead; guest Liam Sullivan.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: Trampas tries to lead immigrants to fight a rich landlord forcing them from their prosperous community.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: Jennifer overrides a family's objections and tries to open up an emotionally withdrawn girl (Stacy Maxwell) who has witnessed a murder; guests Lou Antonio, Angela Clarke, Anthony Caruso.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: A veteran cowboy (Harry Guardino) finds planning a payroll robbery at Shiloh difficult when he forms a friendship with Randy and a wild stallion brings back his pride at being a top bronc buster.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: Randy's rowdy family arrives in town to protect him from a vengeful former convict who belongs to a family embroiled in a feud with the Bentons; guests Andrew Prine, Royal Dano, Andrew Duggan.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: The Virginian seeks the man who could clear a condemned man of murder.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: Trampas enlists the aid of an ex-card dealer (Nita Talbot) to help him deliver a boy (Clint Howard) and his baby sister to their mother in Laramie.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: A group of heavily armed men arrives in Medicine Bow and begins a mysterious vigil; guests John Anderson, Fabrizio Mioni, Jan Shepard, John Dehner, Val Avery.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: Garth leaves for new duties as acting governor and hires a tough man to run the ranch, angering both ranch hands and neighbors.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: A chief clashes with Starr, Randy and a bounty hunter when he leaves the reservation for bison to save his tribe.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: Randy loves the daughter (Peggy Lipton) of a ranch family whose outlaw son (James Farentino) returns to settle a grudge; guest Michael J. Pollard.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: A former outlaw (Victor Jory) just released from prison after 35 years comes to Medicine Bow and is confronted by a glorified account of his exploits as chronicled in dime novels; guest Linden Chiles.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: Someone hires an ex-marshal (Leslie Nielsen) to murder the signers of an important trade agreement with Mexico; guests Hans Gudegast (Eric Braeden), Richard Devon.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Drifter Jess Harper arrives in Laramie searching for a man, but gunfire sends him out into the countryside, where he meets rancher Slim Sherman and his brother, Andy.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck drifter with ties to Jess arrives at the Sherman station with a lady preacher; though Jess tries to avoid the man, events force Jess to become involved.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Martha Chambers takes refuge from vengeful Indians at the Sherman ranch after she kills the son of a Pawnee chief in a moment of blind terror.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Gil Brady seeks out help from his brother-in-law, Jess Harper, when he deserts the calvary and heads for Canada.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Tully Hatch, the man who saved Jess Harper's life and later made him a deputy sheriff, has been accused of robbing a bank and Jess feels he must help him.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess takes on an undercover job for the sheriff, acting as a guide for an outlaw who's searching for money stolen in an earlier robbery.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess capture an outlaw and his partner, but find the tables turned when the outlaw's gang breaks the pair out of jail during the trial.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Townsfolk are worried when a known hired killer arrives in Laramie and asks for directions to the Sherman ranch.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A beautiful but greedy rancher's wife turns to old friend Jess for help in leaving her rich husband, but her husband has sent bounty hunters after her.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim's old war buddy arrives on the stage, ostensibly for a visit, but his real intent is to assassinate General Sherman.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess is livid when his innocent friend is tried, convicted and hanged for the murders of Doc Webb and Sheriff Kiley.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A priest tries to arrange a meeting with Sitting Bull to talk about a peace treaty.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: After a run-in with a traveling prizefighter leaves a mess at the station, Jonesy becomes the man's promoter to help pay the bills at the station.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim gets a threatening letter, addressed to his late father, from a man who wants vengeance for the death of his son.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: While Jess is away, Slim leases a rough section of land to a former lawman who, unbeknownst to Slim, has hired a bunch of outlaws as his ranch hands.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Wyoming Territory has become the winter battleground for the warring Sioux and Cheyenne, forcing Slim and Jess to close the ranch and relay station.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: After a drought and the ending of the stage line, Slim and Jess must join a cattle drive run by a stranger who at first seems impressive, but soon their suspicions are aroused.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When Jess serves as a special deputy to transport a man who's accused of killing his wife, the stagecoach is attacked by a group that's looking for the prisoner.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Aging but beautiful Lily Langford is touring the West, and she arrives in Laramie broke and one step ahead of bill collectors, thanks to her gambler husband.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Passengers of a stagecoach, forced to wait out a storm at the Sherman Ranch, all have something they are trying to hide.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: The new stage line superintendent wants Jess fired, which causes tension on the ranch; Slim and Jess track horse thieves.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A man interrupts a murder and robbery, and makes the most out of his moment of celebrity at Slim's expense.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess unwillingly works to help T.J. Patterson track a thief who stole money from the stage line, along with the heart of Patterson's daughter.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Five years after committing murder, Frank Buckley is paroled to Slim Sherman, but there are some in town who don't want the killer in their midst.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess hunt for Vernon Kane, who has robbed the bank and killed a popular deputy, but their search also leads them to a gambler and his wife, who've joined forces with the outlaw.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess join a posse hunting for three escaped gang members who attempted to rob the Wells Fargo office, killing a deputy sheriff.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess become involved in a fight between the ranchers and the homesteaders, and despite their efforts at keeping the situation under control, a rancher is murdered.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Hoping to find a better price for their cattle, Slim and Jess wind up in Nebraska, where the death of the marshal leads the two to take his place for a month.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess, on the run after killing a marshal, is offered a place in Owen Cantrell's private army fighting in a border dispute between the U.S. and Canada.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim encounters a loudmouthed bully with a wagon train on the outskirts of town, and when the bully is killed, Slim is kidnapped to face charges of murder per the wagon train rules.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess and the marshal hunt a band of outlaws, but after gunfire is exchanged, the gang leader suggests a prisoner exchange -- he'll give back the local man he's taken in exchange for Jess and the marshal.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When Jess goes to help an old prospector friend, he crosses Matt Jessup and his gang, who have the townsfolk too scared to talk.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A professor from the East asks Slim to guide him to his friend's gold strike from a decade earlier, but there is more to the professor than meets the eye.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A woman looks to Slim for help when a gang of outlaws plans to kill her marshal husband as revenge for a robbery he averted.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: While Jess is acting sheriff of Laramie, a notorious yet cowardly bounty hunter targets one of Jess' friends.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: While delivering $10,000 to the stage office, Slim manages to stop one holdup attempt, but a second attempt is successful, leaving Slim to chase down the missing money and the robber.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A bank robbery leads to the recovery of a high-strung horse from Slim's ranch, and prompts a disagreement between Slim and Andy.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: While catching mustangs, Slim and Jess save a man's life, and Slim offers the man a spot at the ranch, to Jess' chagrin.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess hope to sell horses to the stage line and collect the extra money offered, so Jess goes in search of horses to sell.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: In the 1870s Wyoming, Slim Sherman and his brother try to save the ranch after their father's death.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A bounty hunter turned sheriff comes looking for Jess, who has a price on his head for the killing of Blake Wilkie.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Outlaws take over a town nearly emptied by a rumor of gold, leaving Slim outnumbered and unable to go for help.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Fran Ericson returns to Laramie looking for revenge on the stage company she blames for her father's ruin.

Starring: Rajinikanth,Akshay Kumar. In Chennai, mobiles begin flying out of people's hands. Dr. Vaseegaran reactivates his robot, Chitti, to battle the bird-like supernatural force of Pakshirajan, who controls the skies.

programme.title: Kantara: A Legend Chapter-1
programme.desc: Starring: Rishab Shetty,Jayaram. In pre-colonial Karnataka, during the Kadamba dynasty era, the ritual of Bhuta Kola takes root in the culture. Meanwhile, the seeds for the rise of Kaadubettu Shiva are also sown.

programme.title: RRR
programme.desc: Starring: N. T. Rama Rao Jr.,Ram Charan. A fearless revolutionary and an officer in the British force, who once shared a deep bond, decide to join forces and chart out an inspirational path of freedom against the despotic rulers.

programme.title: Jaat
programme.desc: Starring: Sunny Deol,Randeep Hooda and Regina Cassandra. A stranger's clash with Varadaraja Ranatunga's men in a coastal village exposes the locals' misery and begins a battle for justice.

programme.title: Sky Force
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Veer Pahariya. Amid escalating airstrikes between India and Pakistan, a group strives to uncover the truth behind the conflict, risking their lives to stop deadly consequences.

programme.title: Ka Pae Ranasingam
programme.desc: Starring: Vijay Sethupathi, Aishwarya Rajesh. Ariyanachi, a poor woman, strives to bring her deceased husband's body back to India from Dubai, battling the odds of political agenda, corruption and a treacherous bureaucracy that stand in her way.

programme.title: Apna Sapna Money Money
programme.desc: Starring: Sunil Shetty,Shreyas Talpade. After cheating Rana, Kishan runs away and takes on the guise of a lady. Meanwhile, the police are after a woman of the same name.

programme.title: Bagheera
programme.desc: Starring: Sriimurali,Rukmini Vasanth. Faced with a corrupt system and rising crime, a brave police officer becomes a vigilante, risking everything to protect the innocent and fight back against injustice with his own methods.

programme.title: Toofan
programme.desc: Starring: Chiranjit,Shakuntala Barua. Toofan' is the story of Manik, Archana and their three sons Rabi, Raja and Ranju who are separated because of Mona, goon on a stormy night. They spend many years of their life away from each other.

programme.title: Supreme Khiladi
programme.desc: Starring: Sai Dharam Tej,Raashi Khanna. The mafia's plan to seize a trust's land hits a roadblock when a brave taxi driver defends the heir, igniting a battle of courage, loyalty, and unexpected heroism.

programme.title: Gadar: Ek Prem Katha
programme.desc: Starring: Sunny Deol,Ameesha Patel. Set in 1947, this is the story of a Sikh truck driver who falls in love with a Muslim girl belonging to an aristocratic family.

programme.title: Saamy 2
programme.desc: Starring: Vikram,Keerthy Suresh. Ramasaamy, a receptionist for Minister Viswanathan, dreams big. After saving Viswanathan's daughter from gangsters, he earns her love and begins chasing his civil service ambitions.

programme.title: Vivah
programme.desc: Starring: Shahid Kapoor,Amrita Rao. Poonam, a traditional girl gets engaged to Prem. Their faith and love are tested when an accident occurs and Poonam might be scarred for life.

programme.title: 90 ML
programme.desc: Starring: Neha Solanki,Ravi Kishan. A close group of friends gather over drinks, but casual moments soon expose hidden emotions, strained relationships, &personal conflicts, forcing them to confront responsibility & friendship

programme.title: Gowli
programme.desc: Starring: Srinagara Kitty,Paavana Gowda. Gist of the story is the consequences of the unexpected events in Gowli's life, the innocent villager who doesn't know what is anger & hate.

programme.title: Kesari
programme.desc: Starring: Virat Madake,Rupa Borgoankar. Balram, a wrestler from a humble background, dreams of Maharashtra Kesari, but his father opposes him. He must choose between his passion for wrestling and family expectations.

programme.title: No Entry
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Anil Kapoor. A married man decides to have an extramarital affair. Things do not go as planned and life becomes a bundle of confusion.

programme.title: Haan Maine Bhi Pyaar Kiya
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Karisma Kapoor. Shiv and Pooja share a happy marriage until she discovers his infidelity. When film star Raj enters her life, love, choices, and self-worth are tested unexpectedly by fate.

programme.title: Ramaiya Vastavaiya
programme.desc: Starring: Shruti Haasan,Sonu Sood. Urbanite Ram falls for rural beauty Sona, nurtured by her brother Raghuveer. Ram faces a test to earn Raghuveer's approval after a family dispute.

programme.title: Pralay The Destroyer
programme.desc: Starring: Sai Srinivas Bellamkonda,Pooja Hegde. A baby survives a brutal massacre. Years later, destiny leads him back to the gang that destroyed his family, setting the stage for revenge, justice, and an epic showdown.

programme.title: Pushpa 2
programme.desc: A daring smuggler named Pushpa expands his illegal empire, craving power and respect on a vengeful quest, while confronting familiar rivals and fresh threats along the way.

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Sonakshi Sinha. Chulbul Pandey, a rebellious cop, slays a politician's brother. Retaliation ensues as the politician's henchmen target Chulbul's wife, igniting his fury.

programme.title: Coolie No. 1 (1995)
programme.desc: Starring: Govinda,Karisma Kapoor. A matchmaker plans to humble Hoshiyar Chand by arranging for Raju, a coolie, to pose as a millionaire suitor for his daughter. Comedy ensues as their scheme leads to unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Police Police
programme.desc: Starring: Ravi Teja,Sneha. Venkateswarlu discovers he's entangled in a train double murder. Later, at the academy, he learns their boss is the culprit.

programme.title: Ghajini
programme.desc: Starring: Aamir Khan,Asin Thottumkal. After a brutal attack, Sanjay's memory resets every fifteen minutes. Armed with tattooed notes, he seeks his fiancee's killer, navigating a labyrinth of clues before time resets his investigation.

programme.title: Jaanwar
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Karisma Kapoor. A reformed criminal, Babu finds purpose in raising a train crash survivor as his own. But when his past resurfaces, his newfound happiness hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Khandaan
programme.desc: Radha marries a kind-hearted Govind who is paralysed due to an accident. Though Govind highly respects his uncle and aunt, a property dispute forces them to live like strangers under the same roof.

programme.title: Bobby
programme.desc: Raja, son of a rich businessman falls in love with Bobby, a fisherman's daughter. Their families aren't ready for their marriage.

programme.title: Jaag Utha Insan
programme.desc: Mahant Chaturvedi disapproves of his daughter's marriage, severing ties. Years later, his talented granddaughter Sandhya faces a love triangle, marrying Nandu while longing for Hari.

programme.title: Mard
programme.desc: British plunder India's wealth, but brave king Azaad Singh fights back. Wounded, he sends son away for safety. Son grows into hero 'Mard,' fights oppression, unites with family to defeat British.

programme.title: Kuchhe Dhaage
programme.desc: In Chambal, a Brahman betrays a Thakur and sparking a cycle of revenge. Lakhan, born of the feud and fulfills his destiny by killing Tulsiram.

programme.title: Priyatama
programme.desc: Ravi and Dolly are a married couple with relationship problems. Dolly's father decides to visit them to sort out the issues, but to avoid the topic, the couple pretends to be in love with each other.

programme.title: My Life My Story
programme.desc: RJ Anmol chats with Bollywood stars who share real stories, emotional memories, and funny moments from their lives. A candid and heartwarming glimpse into stardom.

programme.title: Shiv Sati Vivah
programme.desc: Dive into the epic love story of Lord Shiva and goddess Parvati, filled with passion, duty, sacrifice, and heart-wrenching separation in this captivating new series.

programme.title: Seeta Aur Geeta
programme.desc: Seeta (Hema Malini) is an unhappy heiress who is mistreated by her aunt, Kaushalya (Manorama), who holds the purse strings in the household even though her wealth comes from Seeta's late parents. Despondent, Seeta runs off to end her life, but is rescued and mistaken for her lost twin sister, Geeta (also Malini), who grew up poor and became a tough-minded street performer. The two switch places, surprising those around them by their drastically changed temperaments.

programme.desc: Omerta (2018) is a gripping biographical thriller about Ahmed Omar Saeed Sheikh, a British-born terrorist involved in kidnappings and the murder of journalist Daniel Pearl.

programme.title: The Burning Train
programme.desc: An engineer's dream of making the perfect train for Indian Railways is given hope when the company commissions his prototype. After years dedicating himself to his dream, his family has suffered, but now he hopes to make it all up to them with the train's triumphant inaugural journey. However, an embittered fellow employee has other ideas.

programme.title: Mr White Mr Black
programme.desc: Before dying, Gopi's father asks him to find Kishen and hand over a piece of land. Gopi travels to Goa, where he is drawn into chaos by Kishen and his dangerous look-alike brother, the hoodlum Hari.

programme.title: Anjaana Anjaaani
programme.desc: The film of two strangers, who meet on a bridge intending to commit suicide. After bonding over their shared miseries,they make a pact to live life to the fullest for the next 20 days and explore various adventures together. As they embark on this trip, they begin to develop feelings for each other, leading to a complex and emotional journey. Will they embrace their new-found love or stick to their original plan?

programme.title: Aarakshan
programme.desc: The controversial policy of caste-based reservations in government jobs and educational institutions in India leads to a conflict between a teacher hailing from a lower class, his good friend belonging to the upper caste, and his mentor.

programme.title: Ek Thi Daayan
programme.desc: A supernatural thriller that tells the story of a magician haunted by a childhood memory of encountering a witch. When he falls in love with a woman who resembles the witch, he must confront his fears and uncover the truth about her identity. The film explores themes of superstition, fear, and the power of the mind in a spine-tingling and suspenseful plot.

programme.title: Tango Charlie
programme.desc: Tarun, a BSF officer, along with his battalion gets deployed to Kargil when a war between India and Pakistan breaks out. This is where Tarun faces the life-threatening challenge.
